description_long: This shopping mall is a sprawling, multi-level structure with a distinctive terracotta-tiled roof featuring multiple gabled and hipped sections, giving it a traditional yet grand appearance. The building's footprint is rectangular with several protruding wings and a large central section, suggesting a complex internal layout. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, likely concrete or stucco, with dark horizontal bands that may represent windows or decorative elements. The main entrance is prominent, set within a recessed area flanked by columns and possibly glass doors, providing a welcoming focal point. There are no visible large display windows, but the roof design and facade details indicate a blend of modern and vernacular architectural influences. The structure appears solid and robust, suitable for high foot traffic and commercial activity.
description: A large, rectangular shopping mall with a terracotta-tiled, multi-gabled roof and light-colored exterior walls, featuring a prominent main entrance and traditional architectural elements.
description_view_0: The front and side of the mall are visible, highlighting the main entrance with a recessed area and the complex, multi-gabled roof structure.
description_view_1: This view shows the rear of the mall, emphasizing the symmetry of the roof and the absence of visible entrances or display windows.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the mall is visible, showing the extended wings and the continuity of the roof design, with no clear entrance.
description_view_3: The rear view again, focusing on the central roof section and the uniformity of the building's back facade.
